text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: OCC 2023-17: Third-party risk management — inherent risk scoring (2.2) and risk tier assignment (2.3)
satisfy mandatory risk classification requirements for vendor engagement.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: SR 11-7: Model risk management — AI Risk Classification (2.4) applies model risk tier (Tier 1/2/3) per
Federal Reserve SR 11-7. Tier 1 AI models require independent validation and Board reporting.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: GDPR/CCPA: Scope Definition (2.5) and Regulatory Mapping (2.6) identify data residency requirements,
PII/NPI processing obligations, and cross-border transfer restrictions.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: EU AI Act: AI initiative flag (Gateway: AI Initiative?) triggers mandatory Article 6 risk classification. High-
risk AI systems require conformity assessment before procurement.
